title: lotus corniculatus var. ciliatus
intro: Lotus corniculatus var. ciliatus, also known as beaked meadow-pea or bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus corniculatus var. ciliatus include its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in poultices or salves to treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema.
